nodes.label: AI as drafting collaborator for legal documents
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate with AI heavily when asking for help with drafting

nodes.label: AI for initial legal research and case finding
nodes.label_negative: AI hallucinated citations leading to sanctions
nodes.grounding_span: help me find cases in Maryland where a continuance was granted

nodes.label: Personalized client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to write e-mails to clients myself

nodes.label: Thorough verification of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I am reviewing the case to locate those exact quotes

nodes.label: AI as cost-saving tool for small practice
nodes.grounding_span: it has allowed me to keep my overhead costs low

nodes.label: Professional competence and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: ensure that everything accurately aligns with the position I want to present

nodes.label: Client trust and personal connection
nodes.grounding_span: I want them to be personalized thoughtful and really sound like it is coming from me

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saved so much time because it quickly found relevant statues and or case law

nodes.label: Judicial integrity and trust in legal system
nodes.grounding_span: People want to feel like they can truly trust the judicial system

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for time-saving in simple motions
nodes.grounding_span: I have felt satisfied mostly when AI has helped me to save so much time

nodes.label: Caution due to AI hallucination risks in legal context
nodes.grounding_span: many lawyers have been getting fined or sanctioned by the court system for using AI generated legal citations

nodes.label: Optimism about AI's future growth and regulation
nodes.grounding_span: I hope Ai will continue to get smarter and brighter

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in client-facing communication
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to write e-mails to clients myself

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative refinement — breaks drafting into sections and tweaks
nodes.grounding_span: I will start section by section or paragraph by paragraph

nodes.label: Systematic verification — cross-checks AI outputs with primary sources
nodes.grounding_span: I am reviewing the case to locate those exact quotes and then I am reading the context
